warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: A monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
A monthly report will be provided highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.
A monthly report will be provided highlighting key operating and performance statistics and indicators.
A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast both on an accrual and cash basis.
A monthly report will be provided that includes a comparison of actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues with the budget and prior year results.

A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints. In alternating quarters, the report will include additional information on diversity initiatives.
In alignment with MTA's strategic priorities, a biannual report to the Committee on the Railroads' progress in delivering safe and reliable transportation and excellent customer service.
MTA Real Estate will provide an annual report on leasing and construction opportunities and financial and marketing information related to retail development in Grand Central Terminal.
A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2024 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2023 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.

A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2024 Budget.
The Committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.
A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.

tool_args.label: Joint Railroad Strategic Priorities Update – November 2023

payload.description: In alignment with MTA's strategic priorities, a biannual report to the Committee on the Railroads' progress in delivering safe and reliable transportation and excellent customer service.
The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2024.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Metro-North Committee Work Plan for 2024 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.
A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.
Annual review and approval of the MNR Committee Charter.
The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2024 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.
A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.

The Agency will present its revised 2024 Financial Plan. These plans will reflect the 2024 Adopted Budget and an updated Financial Plan for 2024 reflecting the out-year impact of any changes incorporated into the 2024 Adopted Budget.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
A report will be presented to the Committee on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2023 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by Metro-North.
A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2023 Operating Budget Results

payload.description: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance will be presented to the Committee.
A quarterly report will be provided that highlights the progress made on track maintenance work to bring the infrastructure to a state of good repair.
The Committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads going into effect in December 2020.
